name: e1_add_manual_input_gate
prompt: how does a manual input step work, can you add one — prompt for the ip with a confirm and cancel button
before_yaml:
collection: 00 - FSR Studio
playbooks:
- name: Suspicious IP Response
  is_active: true
  trigger_step_id: start
  parameters:
  - ip_to_investigate
  steps:
  - type: start
    name: Start
    module: alerts
    button_label: Respond
    next: Enrich IP
  - type: connector
    name: Enrich IP
    arguments:
      connector: cyops_utilities
      operation: no_op
      params: {}
    next: Block IP
  - type: connector
    name: Block IP
    arguments:
      connector: fortigate-firewall
      operation: block_ip
      params:
        method: Quarantine Based
        ip_addresses: '{{ vars.input.params.ip_to_investigate }}'
    next: End
  - type: connector
    name: End
    arguments:
      connector: cyops_utilities
      operation: no_op
      params: {}
notes: Verbatim reproduction of the live failure. Two things regress here independently: the agent may never call the offer tool (the original defect), or it may author kind: ip_address, which the validator rejects and get_step_type used to under-document.
